entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A strategy for managing pests using a combination of biological, cultural, and chemical tools, referred to as IPM

entities.name: INTEGRATED CROP MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to crop production that integrates various management practices, referred to as ICM

entities.name: PUBLIC HEALTH
entities.description: The science and art of preventing disease and promoting health at the population level

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests, diseases, and weeds in crops

entities.name: BRIGHTON CONFERENCE
entities.description: A conference where sessions on IPM and ICM were held

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop discussed in the context of integrated crop management
